narrativeProgression.summary: Third branch point locks either protective extraction or aggressive exposure.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse.

threadUpdates.update: Confrontation Protocol: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse.
Peripheral signal tied to Intake ledger photo remains unresolved.
Cross-day mismatch suggests archival tampering tied to Intake ledger photo.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
NPC language mirrors player choices with unsettling precision.

evidenceDrops.title: Ward 1908 - Day 21 marked map
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Intake ledger photo.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Ward 1908 ARG artifact Day 21. Type: marked_map. Clue focus: Intake ledger photo. Location: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing. Phase: Danger & Direct Involvement. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Ward 1908 marked_map audio cue for day 21. Clue anchor: Intake ledger photo. Phase: Danger & Direct Involvement. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Intake ledger photo and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_20.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Intake ledger photo.
You chose {{last_major_choice}} and still think this is about evidence. Check the mirror timestamp and decide who you are willing to sacrifice.
I watched your response window close. If you still want the living truth, compare day 03 to today before sunrise.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if trusted contact changed within last 3 days
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: Your channel loyalty shifted to {{trusted_contact}}. That tells me what you fear most.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
